High-Performance SSH User Setup for DNSTT Tunneling An automated Bash script to deploy a restricted, high-concurrency SSH user optimized for DNSTT/VPN tunneling. Features include Kernel-level TCP tuning (sysctl), Connection Tracking optimization, aggressive KeepAlive logic to kill zombie connections, and Systemd resource quotas (CPU/RAM capping) for server stability under heavy load.
